release_notes: Work eligibility is now in Recruitment: every applicant shows their status (Citizen/PR or Working visa, with a list chip), and for visa holders admins can view the visa and its AI-scanned details (labelled 'verify via VEVO'), then record the check with Mark VEVO verified. Converting a visa holder who isn't verified shows a reminder. Also adds a ⧉ New window button to open any tab in its own bookmarkable window.
